ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization image */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data is collected */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "nonsense_column" REAL /* An unexplained or experimental column */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the data entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Month the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the month */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_documentation" TEXT /* Documentation for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source link */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the quality metric */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "quality_check_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
